name: claude-managed-agents-cloudflare
description: Self-hosted Claude Managed Agent runner on Cloudflare using the Sandbox SDK

ANTHROPIC_ENVIRONMENT_KEY.description: Anthropic environment key — the single credential the control plane uses to authenticate every call in the worker flow (poll, ack, heartbeat, force-stop, session event stream, skill download). Renamed from ANTHROPIC_ENV_KEY in the 0.96 SDK / ant 1.8 CLI.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key (sk-ant-...) — used to call the Managed Agents API (/v1/agents, /v1/sessions).

WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: HMAC signing secret from the Anthropic Console — verifies incoming webhook requests.

ENVIRONMENT_ID.description: Anthropic environment ID this Worker polls for work.

EMAIL_DOMAIN.description: Zone the per-session inbox addresses are minted under (e.g. agents.example.com). Required for the cf_email_inbox / cf_email_read tools and the catch-all email route. Leave blank to disable the inbox side of the email tools.

EMAIL_FROM.description: Default sender address for cf_email_send. Must belong to a zone you control via Cloudflare Email Routing. Leave blank to require the agent to pass `from` explicitly on every send.
